title: The Amazing World Of Mobs renovated
description: Variety of epic creatures with Animations!
body:
The amazing world of mobs is a mod that will add a variety of creatures with animations and objects to the game adding more difficulty when encountering these mobs.

 

- mod entities:

Void Monsters
![void monsters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b49f583b4cf5819967285fec03fe6b1b7331f9c7.png)


Neutral Creatures
![neutral creatures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48c2a5ea2593c06698583fde814b66a6b26fc945.png)


Monsters Mobs
![monsters #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00704560629600840cb6218e0b696c38845790db.png)
![monsters #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d75e2366419d0d561acdc91800c261d9784e7b.png)

- Items
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69c4285da1da998d028a5f7a08cedec0d7bda00.png)

- New Ores
![new ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d17c3938475259870ffa6dfd8b45d489a95a5ffc.png)

- 3 types of mini structures
![structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5359cca6dd5d49c34f95c5c791a6a72eefc0f041.png)

 

The mobs deal a lot more damage than normal and have a lot of life to kill them, so be careful when you encounter them!!!!

note:

the mod may contain some bugs that I will try to fix as I update it as I'm not very good at this....

**WARNING!!!

the mod requires (GeckoLib)**
